section_title: Power to order sufficient bail when that first taken is insufficient
chapter_title: Provisions As To Bail And Bonds
text: If, through mistake, fraud, or otherwise, insufficient sureties have been accepted, or if they afterwards become insufficient, the Court may issue a warrant of arrest directing that the person released on bail be brought before it and may order him to find sufficient sureties, and on his failing so to do, may commit him to jail.
